recommendations.title: The Lost Husband
recommendations.overview: Trying to put her life back together after the death of her husband, Libby and her children move to her estranged Aunt's goat farm in central Texas.

recommendations.title: Yentl
recommendations.overview: In a time when girls were forbidden to study religious scriptures, a Jewish girl masquerades as a boy to enter religious training and unexpectedly finds love along the way.

recommendations.title: Sundays

recommendations.title: Return
recommendations.overview: Eyüp decides to cross mount Ararat looking for his aunt in Yerevan after following a madman's words. His aunt has also been expecting someone to come from behind this mount for many years. Eyüp cannot be sure about the woman he finds behind the blue

recommendations.title: Leap of Faith
recommendations.overview: Jonas Nightengale is a fraudulent Christian faith healer who makes a living travelling around America holding revival meetings and conducting 'miracles' with the help of his friend and manager, Jane, and their entourage.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: Mortal World

recommendations.title: Memories of Matsuko
recommendations.overview: While combing through the belongings of his recently deceased aunt, Matsuko, nephew Sho pieces together the crucial events that sank Matsuko's life into a despairing tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Five Devils

recommendations.title: Princess Cyd
